name: @brepkit/wasm
description: TypeScript bindings for the brepkit modeling engine

scripts.build:wasm: cd ../.. && cargo build -p brepkit-wasm --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/brepkit_wasm.wasm --out-dir bindings/ts/pkg --typescript
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:ts
